<!--
PR titles must follow Conventional Commits (e.g. "feat: add hamster mascot").
The title becomes the squash-merge commit that release-please reads.
See .github/CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short summary of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Open an issue first for non-trivial changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `task check` passes locally (type-check, Clippy lint, all tests)
- [ ] The PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docs/comments updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] I verified the change on at least one platform (note which below)

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- For UI changes, a before/after screenshot or GIF helps a lot. -->
